2604.06995.title: What's Missing in Screen-to-Action? Towards a UI-in-the-Loop Paradigm for Multimodal GUI Reasoning
2604.06995.paper_summary: Existing Graphical User Interface (GUI) reasoning tasks remain challenging, particularly in UI understanding. Current methods typically rely on direct screen-based decision-making, which lacks interpretability and overlooks a comprehensive understanding of UI elements, ultimately leading to task failure. To enhance the understanding and interaction with UIs, we propose an innovative GUI reasoning paradigm called UI-in-the-Loop (UILoop). Our approach treats the GUI reasoning task as a cyclic Screen-UI elements-Action process. By enabling Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to explicitly learn the localization, semantic functions, and practical usage of key UI elements, UILoop achieves precise element discovery and performs interpretable reasoning. Furthermore, we introduce a more challenging UI Comprehension task centered on UI elements with three evaluation metrics. Correspondingly, we contribute a benchmark of 26K samples (UI Comprehension-Bench) to comprehensively evaluate existing methods' mastery of UI elements. Extensive experiments demonstrate that UILoop achieves state-of-the-art UI understanding performance while yielding superior results in GUI reasoning tasks.
2604.06995.paper_summary_zh: 現有的圖形用戶界面（GUI）推理任務仍然具有挑戰性，特別是在用戶界面理解方面。當前的方法通常依賴於直接基於螢幕的決策，這缺乏可解釋性，並且忽視了對用戶界面元素的全面理解，最終導致任務失敗。為了增強對用戶界面（UI）的理解和互動，我們提出了一種創新的GUI推理範式，稱為UI-in-the-Loop（UILoop）。我們的方法將GUI推理任務視為一個循環的螢幕-用戶界面元素-行動過程。通過使多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）明確學習關鍵用戶界面元素的定位、語義功能和實際使用，UILoop實現了精確的元素發現並進行可解釋的推理。此外，我們引入了一個更具挑戰性的以用戶界面元素為中心的UI理解任務，並設置了三個評估指標。相應地，我們貢獻了一個包含26K樣本的基準（UI Comprehension-Bench），以全面評估現有方法對用戶界面元素的掌握。廣泛的實驗表明，UILoop在用戶界面理解性能上達到了最先進的水平，同時在GUI推理任務中取得了更優越的結果。
2604.06995.author: Songze Li et.al.
2604.06995.authors: Songze Li, Xiaoke Guo, Tianqi Liu, Biao Yi, Zhaoyan Gong, Zhiqiang Liu, Huajun Chen, Wen Zhang
